jobs.title: Account Manager, Enterprise Core
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>ZoomInfo is where careers accelerate. We move fast, think boldly, and empower you to do the best work of your life.&nbsp;You'll be surrounded by teammates who push each other to grow, in a culture that prizes ownership, candour, and craft.</p></div><p>As an <strong>Account Manager, Enterprise Core<em> </em></strong>, you'll own a book of ZoomInfo's largest enterprise customers across the United States. You’ll partner closely with the Customer Success and Renewals teams to drive net-revenue retention through expansion of seats, modules (ZoomInfo Sales, ZoomInfo Marketing, ZoomInfo Talent, ZoomInfo Operations, ZoomInfo Engage, ZoomInfo Chat, ZoomInfo Chorus, ZoomInfo Copilot), and data feeds. You'll be remote-first, reporting into the Vancouver, Washington headquarters.</p>

jobs.title: Account Manager, Enterprise Growth

location.name: Bethesda, Maryland, United States; Vancouver, Washington, United States; Waltham, Massachusetts, United States

jobs.content: <p>ZoomInfo’s <strong>Enterprise Growth</strong> team is looking for an Account Manager to drive new-logo expansion in the Mid-Market and Enterprise tiers. The role is hybrid across our Bethesda, Vancouver (Washington), and Waltham offices.</p><p>You'll partner with the Sales Development Representatives (SDR) Outbound MM team and the Account Executive (AE) New Sales team to qualify and close $50K&ndash;$500K ACV opportunities into Mid-Market accounts. ZoomInfo Copilot, ZoomInfo Engage, and ZoomInfo Chorus are the flagship products you'll be positioning into the Mid-Market pipeline.</p>
